info.title: Grass Touch API
info.description: This API provides information about whether Kim has touched grass or not. It also includes details about the last known status and message regarding Kim's outdoor activity.

get.description: Retrieves the current status of whether Kim has touched grass, including the last seen timestamp and a message about outdoor activity.

200.description: Successful response with grass touch status information

example.message: Even dictators need a break sometimes

online.description: Indicates whether Kim is currently online or has touched grass (offline)

lastSeen.description: Timestamp of the last known status update in ISO 8601 format

message.description: A message providing context or commentary about Kim's current outdoor activity status

tags.name: Status
tags.description: Operations related to grass touch status
